name: data_engineer
description: Data pipeline skill for analyzing data flows, suggesting field transforms, validating CIM data models, and designing index strategies.
author: ObsAI Team

default_index.description: Default index name for strategy suggestions

max_volume_gb.description: Maximum daily ingest volume in GB for planning

actions.name: analyze_data_flow
actions.description: Analyze data flow from source to index, identify bottlenecks and suggest improvements for ingestion pipelines.

description.description: Description of the data flow including sources, forwarders, and destinations

actions.name: suggest_transforms
actions.description: Suggest field transforms, extractions, and enrichments for data based on field names and sourcetype.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of field names to analyze

actions.name: validate_data_model
actions.description: Validate a CIM data model mapping against actual data fields to ensure compliance.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of available field names to validate

actions.name: design_index_strategy
actions.description: Suggest index, sourcetype, and retention strategy based on estimated data volume and use case.

use_case.description: Description of the use case (e.g., 'security logs', 'application monitoring')

daily_volume_gb.description: Estimated daily ingest volume in GB
